# kCFStreamPropertyFTPProxyPassword | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ CFNetwork ](/documentation/cfnetwork)

- [ kCFStreamPropertyFTPProxyPassword ](/documentation/CFNetwork/kCFStreamPropertyFTPProxyPassword)

-  kCFStreamPropertyFTPProxyPassword 

Global Variable# kCFStreamPropertyFTPProxyPassword

iOS 2.0–9.0DeprecatediPadOS 2.0–9.0DeprecatedMac Catalyst 13.1–13.1DeprecatedmacOS 10.3–10.11DeprecatedtvOS 9.0–9.0DeprecatedvisionOS 1.0–1.0Deprecated

```
let kCFStreamPropertyFTPProxyPassword: CFString
```

Deprecated

Use NSURLSessionAPI for ftp requests

## [Discussion](/documentation/CFNetwork/kCFStreamPropertyFTPProxyPassword#Discussion)

FTP Proxy Port stream property key or FTP Proxy dictionary key for set and copy operations. The value of this property is a CFString containing the password to be used when connecting to the proxy server.

## [See Also](/documentation/CFNetwork/kCFStreamPropertyFTPProxyPassword#see-also)
